sglang.title: feat: add FA4 SM90 paged KV decode support & update attention docs
sglang.author: zwang86
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add paged KV cache support to FA4 on SM90 (Hopper), enabling FA4 decode on H100/H200 GPUs. Currently FA4 on SM90 is prefill-only because it lacks paged KV support, which is required for decode. SM100 (Blackwell) already has this support.
This implements the sample code provided in #18265

sglang.title: feat: TTL-based prefix pinning with refresh-on-hit for HiRadixCache
sglang.author: ishandhanani
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Adds TTL-based prefix pinning to HiRadixCache for agentic cache control. Pinned prefixes survive LRU eviction (backed up to host memory) and auto-expire after a configurable TTL. Cache hits refresh the TTL (refresh-on-hit), keeping active conversations pinned while idle ones reclaim memory.

However, is_monolithic unconditiona

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix dtype mismatch in RMSNormGated.forward_native() during torch.compile
vllm.author: haosdent
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #35238.
When torch.compile is active (the default with Inductor backend), vLLM disables custom ops (custom_ops=["none"]). This causes RMSNormGated to dispatch to forward_native instead of forward_cuda. The forward_native implementation did not preserve input dtype — PyTorch's mean() on

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Undo the fast_moe_cold_start hack in torch>=2.11
vllm.author: zou3519
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Use torch 2.11's register_opaque_type with hoist=True to lift MOE layer name strings as graph inputs instead of baking them as constants during torch.compile. This supercedes the fast_moe_cold_start workaround for torch>=2.11
Add ModuleName class in torch_utils.py, conditionally register MOE custom

vllm.title: [Rocm][CI] Fix LM Eval Large Models (H100) test group
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
One of the testing model NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B-FP8 uses modelopt as the quant method, which is not supported on Rocm. So this PR:

use models-large-rocm.txt as the config file
add Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507-FP8 to `models-large-rocm.txt'.
